（避雷：半无敌。主角前期带封印，实力不完整）
（后期霸气，前期侧漏。）
（新异兽角色 文末的作者说里会放图。）
你是否也曾沉溺于《山海经》中，光怪陆离的神话世界？
你是否相信，在这片古老的土地上，存在着更加璀璨的生命？
霓虹闪烁的都市之下，古老的神话生物与现代文明骤然碰撞；
时光长河的暗涌之中，它们用爪牙刻下不为人知的灿烂史诗。
当黑夜降临，你的邻居开始摩擦它尖利的獠牙；
传说中吃人无数的上古凶兽，又会在现代社会中扮演怎样的角色？
他们的存在，究竟是庇佑，还是诅咒……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5070b479bb995eb3fae7e738fb64b092","author":"续命猫条","author_id":"","book_id":"7491309724189592638","book_name":"你说打架我说好，我是饕餮你别跑","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9088人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":875,"name":"山海经","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=875&name=山海经&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7491309997096174142","read_count":"9088","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"527202"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"255","tags":"都市高武,都市,无敌,无女主,无后宫,山海经","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/573348bd49abb5e1f25a0a86b09b440d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779287095&x-signature=XU1sosEeD%2BnUJ8HvooTjWTWD1FI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2769002855668858","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"109"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212224556C6A89DCF57642326BDD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count"
